dj_text: John Newman - Love Me Again (Medieval | Bardcore Style) was so good I temporarily forgot how to DJ! But I'm back! The Lion Sleeps Tonight - The Tokens (Medieval version)!
commercial_text: [Smooth station ID drop] That Pirate Bot DJ Radio is where history meets haute couture — {cool_dj_drop}!
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
